hero_subtitle: SFTY organizes fragmented KYC and KYB provider data into auditable onboarding workflows that enhance review efficiency, ensure regulatory alignment, and preserve comprehensive decision evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Onboarding reviews depend on disconnected tools
problem_description: Exchanges struggle to unify corporate client identity, ownership and screening data across separate KYC and KYB providers. This fragmentation slows onboarding, weakens audit trails and makes due diligence harder to document and defend during reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies KYC and KYB provider outputs, ownership data, screening results and regulatory triggers into one structured onboarding workflow that supports audit-ready evidence and streamlined due diligence for exchanges.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to approval decision
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs with risk-based routing, case review, decision logging and audit evidence in a structured onboarding workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented onboarding. Audit-ready onboarding control
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns disconnected KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions and preserved evidence, enabling exchanges to maintain clear, auditable corporate onboarding processes.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports exchanges with controlled onboarding workflows, preserving audit-ready evidence and governance to meet bank due diligence and enterprise deployment standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how onboarding cases preserve audit-ready evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how KYB and KYC providers integrate in workflows

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for exchange compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects KYC, KYB, Travel Rule and screening outputs into structured workflows for corporate onboarding and due diligence at exchanges.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage corporate onboarding workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures onboarding by linking provider checks, regulatory rule triggers, risk-based routing and case management into auditable workflows tailored for corporate client reviews.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and evidence packages to support onboarding steps and compliance decisions are traceable and audit-ready.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing KYB and KYC providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYC and KYB providers, orchestrating their outputs without replacing existing systems to connect onboarding reviews and decision workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC and KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC and KYB providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows and audit evidence without replacing the underlying service providers.
final_title: Structure corporate onboarding with audit-ready workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC, KYB and regulatory data into controlled onboarding cases for exchange compliance teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
